what_it_does: A long running log cataloguing everything the analysed source material exhibits that the design system does not yet implement, organized by confidence (confirmed across 2 then 3 folders, deep comparative findings, seeded-from-first-samples, and multi-pass per-folder additions), with each entry giving what it is, its evidence (folder/page), and its proposed home in the system.
observations: Tracks confirmation across folders explicitly: a confirmed-across-2 section (pitch-deck + deck1-2026), a confirmed-across-3 section (+recent-pitches), and deep comparative findings derivable only from diffing two cuts.
Records exact sampled hex values (zoning near-white ladder, gold-bronze-tan ramp, dataviz multi-hue palette) with the precise tokens to recalibrate.
Introduces the REGISTER/PURPOSE dimension: terse/presented vs verbose/leave-behind as two cuts of one source, driving a register switch over copy content-model + density + motion-slot.
Articulates the space-time complexity trade-off: a slide has a fixed complexity budget spendable in space (dense static) OR time (animation); motion and density are one control.
Names LOD as an axis orthogonal to surface size, and the invariant-skeleton vs flexible-muscle principle (numbers/diagrams never change, prose flexes).

Builds toward the containment-tree capstone: every parametric axis (surface, motion, LOD, interactive, depth, theme, invariants) operates on one nested-container tree; atoms/components/archetypes are templates at different tree depths.

Lists a large inventory of new motifs/atoms to tokenise: blueprint ghost, diagonal gold hatch, frame signature, V-mark, frosted glass, embossed chip, stat callout, profile block, status traffic-light, interactive hotspots, connector vocabulary.
Closes with finest-grain rules: modular type scale (~1.25/step), colour-role logic, latent-motion cues, and a restraint-guardrails anti-pattern list to encode as adherence rules.
Each entry routes to a proposed home (a specific token file or component).
standouts: Space-time complexity budget: dense static and simple-frame-plus-GIF are register variants of one component, swappable — motion and density unified as one control.
Containment-tree synthesis: every axis is an operation on one shared nested-container tree, including the live app's nav-panel-table-row.
Invariant skeleton as a node-TYPE property: numbers are 'sacred', prose is LOD-variable.
Restraint guardrails as explicit refused anti-patterns to encode in adherence rules.
conventions: Each entry follows what-it-is / evidence / proposed-home structure.
Confidence sectioning by number of confirming folders before anything graduates to a token.
Star-headed section markers for confirmed/synthesis-ready clusters.
Routes every finding to a concrete token file or component candidate.
Append/running-log growth; nothing built until cross-folder confirmed.
concerns: The same near-white hex values appear in several sections with minor variations (e.g. #faf9f7 vs #fdfcf7), which could read as inconsistent if not reconciled before tokenising.
notes: The raw evidence ledger behind the design system — every sampled value, motif, and cross-cut principle the system must absorb, each with provenance and a proposed home, graduated by cross-folder confirmation.
questions: Which near-white hex set is authoritative once the minor cross-section variations are reconciled?
When will a product-UI-heavy folder be mined to confirm the embedded app-chrome vocabulary?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — titled as the gap log between material and system, and it is exactly an evidence-routed, confidence-graded gap inventory.
apparent_themes: One containment tree as the spine of every axis
Unification of seemingly separate controls (motion+density, surface+LOD)
intention_signals: Trying to accumulate, with provenance and confidence, every concrete thing the real design system is missing, so synthesis can graduate only multiply-confirmed values into tokens and components rather than acting on a single sample.
novelty: The repeated derivation of deep principles from the DIFF between two cuts of one source (space-time budget, conserved ink-budget, invariant skeleton), and the unification of all parametric axes onto one containment tree.
contribution: Contributes the sampled token values, the new-motif/atom inventory with proposed homes, the register/LOD/space-time/containment-tree principles, and the restraint anti-pattern list that a fused system would keep as its grounded backlog and DNA rules.
summary_for_embedding: A confidence-graded running log of every motif, sampled value, and cross-cutting principle the analysed material has that the ConceptV design system lacks, each with provenance and a proposed token/component home.
intention_for_embedding: To accumulate with evidence and provenance every gap between source material and the real design system so only multiply-confirmed findings graduate into tokens and components.
